description: Firefox bookmarks parser reads places.sqlite moz_bookmarks JOIN moz_places and emits BrowserEvent per URL bookmark
steps: Query: SELECT b.title, p.url, b.dateAdded FROM moz_bookmarks b JOIN moz_places p ON b.fk = p.id WHERE b.type = 1 AND b.dateAdded > 0 ORDER BY b.dateAdded ASC
Test factory creates moz_bookmarks (type=1 for URL, type=2 for folder) and moz_places tables
Test: parse_single_ff_bookmark — attrs[url] and attrs[title] correct, ts_ns correct
Test: folder_type_excluded — row with type=2 in moz_bookmarks produces no events
